preFixReproduction.observed: A tall generic modal displayed a title, explanatory paragraph, seven boxed buttons, unused space and a separate Close button for a simple world switch.

rootCause: The Mool world switch reused the generic action-confirmation sheet intended for search and detailed continuation flows.
resolution: Use a dedicated compact glass action ribbon above the dock with only Social, Buy, Eat, Ride, Book, Pay and Work. Highlight the current world and close after selection, a second Mool tap, an outside tap or Escape.

exactReplay.layout: Two rows: four actions then three actions
